'''Beta Omega''' was the designation for one member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Biography==
In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] helped Beta Omega and another [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilot]] rescue [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] from their downed [[M-class fighter]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].

{{Char-stub}}
